heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1128b Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2009, and such sums as may be necessary for each of the five succeeding fiscal years.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to the general amendment of this part by .section 610 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1127 of this titlePub.
